original_snippet_context: Report on exchange rates and bank transactions.
relevant_quote: The entire text snippet discusses exchange rate fluctuations, which are relevant to monetary debates and particularly to the potential impact of a Caixa de Conversão, as different rates would have distinct implications for the convertibility of the mil-réis.
